name: International-Shipping-Guide-V1.docx
content:
What countries does C.E. King ship to and how long does delivery take?

C.E. King ships worldwide from the United Kingdom. The company regularly supplies machines and spare parts to customers in over 80 countries including the United States, Canada, Europe, Middle East, Africa, Asia, and Australasia.

Details

  • Machines are shipped from the UK via international freight
  • Spare parts ship via courier (DHL, FedEx, UPS depending on destination)
  • Delivery times vary: UK 1-3 days, Europe 3-7 days, USA/Canada 5-10 days, Rest of World 7-21 days (approximate)
  • Customers receive tracking information once goods are dispatched
  • Import duties and customs clearance are the responsibility of the buyer
  • For US customers: there is no US warehouse — all shipments come direct from the UK

Link: https://www.ceking.com/policies/shipping-policy
